description: - automerge is explicitly false at the top level. Renovate's default
is already false, but setting it explicitly makes the intent
unambiguous and prevents an accidental override from a preset
or future packageRule slipping auto-merge in.
- minimumReleaseAge is 30 days globally. A new version has to sit
in the wild for a month before Renovate will even open a PR for it.
vulnerabilityAlerts overrides this to null so CVE fixes are not gated.
- prHourlyLimit: 2 matches the config:recommended default. With the
30-day wait this rarely bites; it is mostly a guard against surprise
- prConcurrentLimit: 10 caps how many Renovate PRs can be open at once.
- pinDigests forces Docker FROM and GitHub Actions references to be
pinned to an immutable sha256 digest.

packageRules.description: Group jackc (pgx) packages. Tightly coupled siblings released together; merging one at a time breaks go.sum resolution.
Group container base images (Go builder + distroless runtime). Both get weekly digest refreshes upstream; one grouped PR is less noise than two.

Major bumps are listed on the Dependency Dashboard as approval checkboxes -- no PR is opened until you tick the box. This avoids PR spam from major releases while keeping full visibility. vulnerabilityAlerts above overrides this (dependencyDashboardApproval: false there) so CVE-driven major upgrades still open a PR directly.
